---
name: Citizen demo or showcase
about: Propose or share a runnable HoC-Republic citizen, family, governance, memory, or artifact-production demo.
title: "[Demo]: "
labels: demo, republic, needs triage
---

## Demo summary

Describe the smallest runnable scenario you want to show. Good examples include a citizen producing an artifact, two citizens forming a family relationship, a child agent inheriting traits, a memory-driven decision, or a governance/election flow.

## What makes it interesting

Explain the technical hook without overstating the result. If the demo uses the AI-citizen marriage, family, digital-genome, or birth mechanic, describe what is implemented and what remains experimental.

## Reproduction steps

```bash
# clone, install, build, onboard, and run where applicable
git clone https://github.com/hunix/HoC-Republic.git
cd HoC-Republic
pnpm install
pnpm build
pnpm ui:build
pnpm dev onboard
pnpm dev gateway run
```

Add any additional commands, fixtures, seeds, environment variables, or scripts required for the demo.

## Expected output

Describe the artifact, trace, screenshot, video, log line, generated file, or metric that proves the demo ran successfully.

## Safety and approval boundary

Does this demo involve generated code, shell execution, credentials, web posting, messaging channels, long-running infrastructure, external APIs, or media generation? If yes, describe what requires explicit human approval.

## Attachments or links

Add screenshots, recordings, trace snippets, generated artifacts, or related source links. Redact secrets and private data.
